name: dev.cz-agents/eu-registry
description: EU business registry lookup — company search and detail across 6 countries via free public APIs: GB (Companies House), SK (ORSR/RPO), PL (KRS), NL (GLEIF/LEI), DE (GLEIF/LEI), FR (SIRENE). Useful for KYC/AML on non-Czech entities, EU parent company identification, and cross-border due diligence.
